title: Buzz Lightyear — board swap, joints, and touch-up
description: Buzz arrived with corroded contacts and a dead board. We fitted a replacement board and arm from another unit, renewed contacts, tightened the arm joint, and touched up paint after cleaning.
itemDetails: Buzz Lightyear figures are licensed Toy Story collectibles released continuously since 1995 across basic, talking, and deluxe formats. Major versions were produced by makers including Thinkway and Mattel-license channels depending on era and region. Most figures use molded ABS/PVC construction with painted decals, articulated joints, and in electronic variants integrated light/sound boards.
repairDetails: This Buzz Lightyear figure had corroded batteries, a failed board, and loose arm joints. We repaired battery contacts, transplanted a replacement circuit board and arm from a donor unit, touched up paint, cleaned the shell, and secured the loosening arm joint.

googleReview.quote: What a great service! Grace repaired Buzz and Woody toys from 1995 — both needed voice boxes repaired/replaced and a good clean and touch up — a great job, great communication about progress — highly recommend her work.
